form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 14 at Bunbury in the LR Bunbury Stakes on March 7 over 1400m, 0.9 len behind Bonjoy carrying 57.5kg at $4. The race before that settled well back; won by a head at Pinjarra Scarpside LR Pinjarra Clsc February 22 over 1300m defeating Talkanco with 56kg at $6. Well placed here on her recent efforts and she can get back to winning ways.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after eight months from last on the turn 7th of 9 at this track Rtg 72+ on April 1 over 1200m, slow going 3.5 len behind Sisu Warrior carrying 57kg at $17. Previously second-up eased back early on 6th of 9 at Pinjarra in the LR Newmarket on August 9 over 1200m, slow going 4 len behind Phanta carrying 54kg at $9. Can improve with that run under her belt and with the blinkers on.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 13 at this track in the LR Grandstand on March 21 over 1500m, 0.5 len behind Bonjoy carrying 54.5kg at $7.50. The race before that 2nd of 14 at Bunbury in the LR Bunbury Stakes on March 7 over 1400m, head behind Bonjoy carrying 54kg at $10. Racing in top order and is not to be discounted.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 6th of 9 at this track in the G3 Roma Cup on April 4 over 1100m, 3 len behind Rope Them In with 56.5kg at $26. Previously second-up 5th of 13 at this track in the LR Jungle Mist on November 15 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Drakaina with 55kg at $8. In this on her best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from on straightening until near the 250m.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming ran on from midfield and won by 1.5 len at Pinjarra Pearl Classic February 14 over 1200m defeating Galway Shawl with 58kg at $10. Last start eased back early on 7th of 11 at this track Rtg 72+ on March 14 over 1200m, 6 len behind Horcrux with 57kg at $5.50. Disappointing last start and she'll need to bounce back in a big way.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 3rd in a small field at this track Rock Magic on March 21 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Oscar's Fortune carrying 53kg at $4.20. Previously second-up 4th of 9 at this track Rtg 76+ on October 25 over 1000m, slow going 0.5 len behind Too Dardy with 54kg at $3.10. Hard to knock on her fresh effort and can make a statement.
